docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, KING FONG AS TO DEFENDANT RIDWELL, GARY ROBERT DOES I TO X SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT RIDWELL, GARY ROBERT ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RIDWELL, GARY ROBERT
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, KING FONG COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAR-01-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

COMPLAINT FILED: 2/2/94 #5 JDG DIANE ELAN WICK. CSR BRENDA FIELDS. CLERK MCSANCHEZ. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COUNSEL FOR PLTF PRESENT. DEFT IN PRO PER PRESENT. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. JUDGMENT FOR PLTF AND AGAINST DEFT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIDWELL, GARY ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3542 ANZA ST, INCLUDING GARAGE, S.F., STAYED UNTIL MAR-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, STAY TIL 5:00PM MARCH 15, 1994. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE BY THAT DATE & TIME WRIT WILL BE EXECUTED IMMEDIATELY WITH NO STAYS. ANY PERSON- AL PROPERTY WILL BE DEEMED ABANDONED.EACH SIDE WAIVE CLAIMS AGAINST EACH OTHER & NO ONE ELSE OCCUPYING THE PREMISES.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RIDWELL, GARY ROBERT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RIDWELL, GARY ROBERT
